customAttributes.description:
Equipped creature has hexproof and haste.
Equip 1
A numbered series of 500 copies of this card was found within the The Brothers' War Collector Booster product. The number on the card you receive will vary from the number pictured in the listing unless otherwise shown in a Listing with Photo.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item with an estimated shipping date of 11/18/2022. Please keep in mind card details, including rarity and card name, may change up until release date as information is updated.
customAttributes.flavorText: "Test 12: Boots now protect wearer from all hazards except blisters. Need to source better insoles." —Development log of Willa, Yotian artificer
